channel.title: Comments on: After the Deadline for bbPress v1.7 Released!

item.title: By: Mittakrish
item.dc:creator: Mittakrish
item.description: After the Deadline is already rocking in WordPress. Now, it is going to rock in bbPress too.
item.content:encoded: After the Deadline is already rocking in WordPress. Now, it is going to rock in bbPress too.

item.title: By: Raymond Cardoza
item.dc:creator: Raymond Cardoza
item.description: After the Deadline plugin is cool for bbPress users
item.content:encoded: After the Deadline plugin is cool for bbPress users

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/after-the-deadline-v1-point-7-released/#comment-1517">Raphael Mudge</a>.
I actually took that from the demo in AtD/jQuery! :P
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Raphael Mudge.

I actually took that from the demo in AtD/jQuery! 😛

item.title: By: Raphael Mudge
item.dc:creator: Raphael Mudge
item.description: :) I'll have to look at the accept all suggestions option. I've had a few suggestions for something like that.
item.content:encoded: 🙂 I’ll have to look at the accept all suggestions option. I’ve had a few suggestions for something like that.
